name: backend-ai-engineering-flyrank
description: Backend AI engineering internship workspace — a growing portfolio of self-contained assignments.

scripts.test:py: npm run test --workspace @flyrank/shared-py && npm run test --workspace @flyrank/assignment-04
scripts.check: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run test:py
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -k -n a01,a02,a03 -c blue,green,magenta "npm start -w @flyrank/assignment-01" "cross-env PORT=3001 npm start -w @flyrank/assignment-02" "cross-env PORT=3002 STORAGE=memory npm start -w @flyrank/assignment-03"
scripts.dev:all:pg: concurrently -k -n a01,a02,a03 -c blue,green,magenta "npm start -w @flyrank/assignment-01" "cross-env PORT=3001 npm start -w @flyrank/assignment-02" "cross-env PORT=3002 STORAGE=postgres npm start -w @flyrank/assignment-03"
